---
id: add-signers
title: "Add Signers to a Document"
description: "Add one or more signers to an existing document."
sidebar_label: "Add Signers to a Document"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add Signers to a Document"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/user-documents/details/signers/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Add one or more signers to an existing document.

The request body is an **array** of signer objects sent directly (not wrapped in an object).

Save the `reference_signer_id` from each signer in the response — you'll need them to send the document for signing.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
